zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fleming於大約1600年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，她的父親Henry Fleming33歲，母親Sarah Dawkine Jenkin30歲。她於大約1627年與Griffith Bowen在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1675年6月9日在英國英格蘭倫敦素瓦可享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fleming于大约1600年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，她的父亲Henry Fleming33岁，母亲Sarah Dawkine Jenkin30岁。她于大约1627年与Griffith Bowen在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1675年6月9日在英国英格兰倫敦素瓦可享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fleming was born about 1600, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Henry Fleming, was 33 and her mother, Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, was 30. She married Griffith Bowen about 1627, in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 9 June 1675, in Southwark, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fleming est née environ 1600, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Henry Fleming, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Griffith Bowen environ 1627, à Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 juin 1675, à Southwark, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fleming è nata il circa 1600 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Henry Fleming, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Griffith Bowen circa 1627, nel Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 giugno 1675, nel Southwark, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Flemingが約1600年にウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父Henry Flemingは33歳，母Sarah Dawkine Jenkinは30歳であった。約1627年にウェールズグラモーガンランジェニスでGriffith Bowenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1675年6月9日にイギリスイギリスロンドンソウスワークで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fleming(이)가 대략 1600년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Fleming(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Dawkine Jenkin(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1627년 웨일스 글램르건 랭니스에서 Griffith Bowen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 6월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 소우스워크에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fleming nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Henry Fleming, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Griffith Bowen aproximadamente 1627, em Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de junho de 1675, em Southwark, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fleming родилась около 1600 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Henry Fleming было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Griffith Bowen около 1627 г. в местности ллангеннит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 9 июня 1675 г. в местности соутварк, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fleming nació aproximadamente 1600, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Henry Fleming, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sarah Dawkine Jenkin, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Griffith Bowen aproximadamente 1627, en Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1675, en Southwark, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
